title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 416.485 - Actions barred, when
text:
416.485.  Actions barred, when. — Any action arising under sections 416.410 to 416.560, whether in law or equity, shall be commenced within two years after the right of action first accrues or is forever barred.
(L. 1959 H.B. 255 § 16)
